goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'peterborough'.
The train should 'arrive by 13:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'departure time', and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'architecture'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from peterborough
The train should arrive by 13:15 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get travel time, departure time, and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of architecture
Make sure you get postcode and entrance fee
